name: io.github.rustok-org/rustok-wallet-tui
description: Self-custody Ethereum wallet (MCP/stdio). Keys stay in a local Docker volume; transactions that move funds require human approval in a terminal console.

runtimeArguments.name: -i
runtimeArguments.description: Keep stdin open — required for the stdio MCP transport.

runtimeArguments.name: --rm
runtimeArguments.description: Remove the ephemeral container on exit (keys persist in the volume).

runtimeArguments.name: --init
runtimeArguments.description: PID-1 init: signal forwarding and zombie reaping.

runtimeArguments.name: -v
runtimeArguments.description: Mount the local keystore volume (self-custody: keys never leave this volume).

password.description: Password that unlocks your local keystore (the one set at create-wallet).

rpc_url.description: Ethereum mainnet RPC URL (an Alchemy key URL, or a public RPC).
